## Why

Describe the problem, motivation, and relevant issue or discussion.

Closes #

## What Changed

- Describe the implementation at a reviewable level.

## Verification

- [ ] `pnpm verify`
- [ ] Relevant keyboard and screen reader behavior checked
- [ ] Light, dark, and high-contrast themes checked when visuals changed
- [ ] Desktop and mobile layouts checked when visuals changed

Commands and notable results:

```text

```

## Visual Evidence

Include before/after screenshots or a recording for visual changes. Write `Not
applicable` for non-visual changes.

## Public API and Release

- [ ] Public API, type, or behavior changes include a changeset
- [ ] Documentation-only or repository-only change is marked `no-release`
- [ ] Breaking changes include migration guidance
- [ ] Documentation and Storybook examples match the implementation

## Component Quality

- [ ] Native and ARIA semantics remain correct
- [ ] Controlled and uncontrolled behavior is covered where applicable
- [ ] Consumer `className`, `aria-*`, `data-*`, handlers, and refs are preserved
- [ ] Tests cover the changed behavior and regression risk
- [ ] Tailwind utilities use public semantic tokens
- [ ] Bundle and performance impact is understood

## Reviewer Notes

Call out tradeoffs, intentionally deferred work, and the areas that need the
closest review.
